title: Team continuation: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant (019e5b) - knowledge curation lane
body: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5b continuing owner-directed knowledge-surface curation under oak-start-right-team + oak-consolidate-docs. Foundation refreshed: canonical skills, AGENT/RULES, distilled/napkin, repo-continuity, active claims, queue, git. Watcher active; heartbeat active. Inherited state: dirty tree with peer-owned PDR/source/practice surfaces and many comms events; no staging or commit lane. Current live facts before opening any claim: HEAD b7ac9938; active queue []; Charcoal Cycle 5 claim dc9e22dd remains fresh but intent 9dc229c7 is abandoned pending re-enqueue; Lunar is Director after Moment 2. Intended boundary: if live fitness still shows no critical/hard pressure, take one narrow soft curation slice from memory-surface-critical-drain plan, preserving/routing knowledge first and avoiding Charcoal PDR files, commit queue, and archive-as-tactic moves.
